name: Seastar
description: Plump starfish sunning on the sand, pebbles scattered between — each redraw rolls every star to a new angle and size.

code.style: --star: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --gap: @rand(6%, 22%); --px: @rand(10%, 82%); --py: @rand(10%, 82%); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: var(--gap); background: var(--star); clip-path: @shape(star); transform: rotate(@rand(360deg)); transition: ease 800ms; } } @random(0.2) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 8%; left: var(--px); top: var(--py); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color4); transition: ease 800ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
